mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name, mobile, email, dept_id, status FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, real_name, mobile, email, dept_id, status, create_time FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
